data.name: Exponential moving average (α=0.2). Recent entries weighted more.
data.value: Rata-rata bergerak eksponensial (α=0,2). Entri terbaru diberi bobot lebih besar.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 30 days.
data.value: Rata-rata sederhana skor suasana hati selama 30 hari terakhir.

data.name: Simple average mood score over the past 7 days.
data.value: Rata-rata sederhana skor suasana hati selama 7 hari terakhir.

data.name: Standard deviation over the past 30 days. Lower = more stable.
data.value: Simpangan baku selama 30 hari terakhir. Semakin rendah = semakin stabil.

data.name: Tracks mood trends with an exponential moving average (α=0.2), 7/30-day averages, and 30-day volatility (standard deviation).
data.value: Melacak tren suasana hati dengan rata-rata bergerak eksponensial (α=0.2), rata-rata 7/30 hari, dan volatilitas 30 hari (simpangan baku).

data.name: Which event type records your mood?
data.value: Jenis acara mana yang merekam suasana hati Anda?

data.name: Which numeric field stores the mood score (e.g. 1–10)?
data.value: Bidang numerik mana yang menyimpan skor suasana hati (misalnya 1–10)?
